Start a project
Software engineering — delivered across time zones

Your engineering team, wherever your business needs it to be.

Fatisoft Global builds and runs software for companies that don't operate on one clock. Product engineering, platform modernization, and always-on support from teams positioned across three continents.

What we build

Full-lifecycle software, not just a headcount extension.

Every engagement is staffed by a dedicated squad who stay with the product from architecture through operation.

01

Product Engineering

Web and mobile applications built from a blank canvas, with an architecture designed to survive your next three years of growth, not just your launch date.

02

Platform Modernization

Legacy systems migrated to modern stacks in staged, reversible steps — so the business keeps running while the foundation changes underneath it.

03

Cloud & DevOps

Infrastructure as code, CI/CD pipelines, and observability set up so deployments are routine events, not scheduled risk.

04

Data & Integrations

Pipelines and APIs that connect the tools your business already runs on, so data moves without someone exporting a spreadsheet.

05

QA & Reliability

Automated test suites and monitoring built alongside the product, catching regressions before your customers do.

06

24/7 Managed Support

Because our teams sit across time zones, someone is always awake when your system needs them — not just during business hours in one city.

How we work

A handoff at the end of every day, not a status update once a week.

Distributed teams only work if the process is designed for it. Here's ours.

WEEK 1

Scope & architecture

We map the problem with your team, agree the technical approach, and set the milestones we'll be judged against.

ONGOING

Daily handoff cycle

Work passes between our regional teams at shift end, so build, review, and fixes progress around the clock instead of waiting for tomorrow.

EVERY RELEASE

Ship, measure, adjust

Releases go out behind flags, get measured against real usage, and the roadmap adjusts on what we learn — not on what we guessed.

AFTER LAUNCH

Stay in operation

The team that built it keeps running it. No re-onboarding a new group when something breaks at 2am your time.

3
Delivery hubs across the Americas, Europe & Africa
120+
Engineers, designers & platform specialists
24/7
Coverage window for live production systems
40+
Products currently in active operation
Let's talk

Tell us what you're building. We'll tell you who'd build it.

A short call is usually enough to know if we're the right fit — and if we're not, we'll say so.
